code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut acc = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if have
        mut val = acc * 2
        if neg
          val = 0 - val
        end
        if first
          out = "#{val}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{val}"
        end
        have = false
        neg = false
        acc = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
      have = true
    else if b == 43
      have = true
    else
      acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    mut val = acc * 2
    if neg
      val = 0 - val
    end
    if first
      out = "#{val}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{val}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
